summary: P1 Corrective Pass Tests - All 24 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) C1 fix - RESEND_API_KEY properly imported in workflows.py from email_service, send_document workflow executes without NameError, (2) I1 fix - doc_extraction.py has zero is_demo references, (3) I2 fix - stats.py has zero is_demo filtering, agent/buyer stats work correctly, (4) I3 fix - no get_is_demo imports in any route file, (5) All canonical endpoints return data without is_demo field.

C1 VERIFIED: send_document workflow executes without NameError (status 200)
I1 VERIFIED: doc_extraction.py has zero is_demo references (non-import)
I2 VERIFIED: stats.py has zero is_demo references, agent_stats and buyer_stats work without is_demo filtering
I3 VERIFIED: No get_is_demo import found in any route file under /app/backend/routes/
All workflow endpoints (templates, execute, history) return data without is_demo
All Phase 1/2/3 endpoints verified: projects, project-timeline, clients, documents, activities, vault-documents, command interpret/draft
Team CRUD (create/get/update/delete) and team directory work without is_demo
Notification endpoint returns correct structure: {notifications, unread_count} with is_read field
seed_data_creation: Test team member created with TEST_ prefix during tests (then deleted). Test agent has project_id=proj_f763e6ef3aaf and client_id=client_0d050a240d04.
